chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5115 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3601/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.22641/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.02.2025 Mr. Arshad Waheed, advocate holding brief for Mr. Liaquat Ali Khan, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Petitioner admittedly has recourse before the statutory forum, therefore, direct recourse to writ jurisdiction is unwarranted. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
